creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

There are some issues with this patch. First, the Makefile already uses 
REINPLACE_CMD to adjust the location of the fonts. Why do it again with 
the static patch for the scripts? This would cause the script to fail on 
non-standard LOCALBASE. Second, on FreeBSD 10 and later, there are no 
'pkg_*' tools, just 'pkg'.
